title: metrosideros regelii
intro: Metrosideros regelii, also known as the New Zealand rata or red rata, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae, native to New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used in Maori medicine, and its medicinal properties include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to be effective against a range of bacterial and fungal infections. The health benefits of Metrosideros regelii include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and potentially reducing the risk of certain diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
